summary: Apply field_monitor schema to the MARKETING Neon database (barton-outreach-core). The schema was previously applied to the CL database in error. Production field_monitor workers must connect to the marketing DB where people.people_master and vendor.blog already reside.

payload.database_url_source: Doppler project barton-outreach-core, config dev, secret DATABASE_URL

tasks.action: Apply 001_initial_schema.sql to the marketing Neon database
tasks.details: Creates field_monitor schema, 5 tables (url_registry, field_state, check_log, error_log, rate_state), CTB promotion trigger, append-only check_log triggers, no-delete error_log trigger, 10 indexes. All idempotent (CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS, but tables use plain CREATE TABLE — will fail if already exists, which is correct since this is first apply).

tasks.action: Verify all 5 tables exist after migration
Verify vendor.blog already exists on marketing DB (confirmed by Builder — EXISTS)
Verify people.people_master.linkedin_url exists on marketing DB (confirmed by Builder — EXISTS)
Run the two seed scripts against marketing DB
tasks.notes: Both are idempotent (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING). May seed 0 rows if source tables are empty — that is acceptable.

constraints: Use Doppler barton-outreach-core DATABASE_URL — NOT the CL database
Migration is idempotent at schema level (IF NOT EXISTS) but tables are first-apply
Do not modify the migration SQL — apply as-is from imo-creator
Verify triggers fire correctly after apply

pre_verification.cl_db_field_monitor: EXISTS (applied in error — CL is wrong target)
